A New Kind of Home Builder

Built for
every stage
of living.

Level Access Builds designs and constructs new homes where accessibility is architectural — not an afterthought. Three signature style lines. Zero compromises on beauty or function. Launching soon in Iowa and Nebraska.

— Three signature home styles, one standard of access.
Style 01Modern / Contemporary
Exterior
Open Kitchen
Primary Bath
Modern / Contemporary
Clean lines.
Wide open plan.
Striking architecture without sacrificing livability. Zero-step entry, wide doorways, and open-concept layouts designed to move with you — now and for decades to come.
Zero-step entry, all access points
36"+ doorways throughout
Curbless roll-in shower standard
Smart home accessibility pre-wired
Style 02Ranch / Farmhouse
Exterior
Great Room
Primary Bath
Ranch / Farmhouse
One level.
Room to breathe.
All the warmth of farmhouse living — wood beams, covered porches, shiplap — with single-story accessibility built into every square foot from the start.
Single-story, no exceptions
Covered zero-step porch entry
Wider hallways and turning radius
Barrier-free shower, teak bench
Style 03Lake House
Exterior
Living / Kitchen
Primary Bath
Lake House
Light pours in.
Nothing in the way.
Cedar, stone, and vaulted ceilings — with wraparound covered porches and barrier-free bathrooms that feel like a private retreat, not a renovation compromise.
Wraparound deck, zero-step access
Cathedral ceiling, open great room
Natural stone curbless shower
Accessible outdoor living standard
